name: artjom-warkentin-cv
description: Public CV and portfolio site for Artjom Warkentin.

scripts.build: node scripts/build.mjs && node scripts/export_pdf.mjs && node scripts/export_docx.mjs
scripts.build:public: PUBLIC_ONLY=1 node scripts/build.mjs && PUBLIC_ONLY=1 node scripts/export_pdf.mjs && PUBLIC_ONLY=1 node scripts/export_docx.mjs
